title: Dettol Anti-Bacterial Biodegradable Large Surface Wipes 110ea
features: Antibacterial surface cleaning wipes, kill 99.9 percent of bacteria and disinfect
Non bleach, no taint and no odour
Kills e.coli, salmonella, rotavirus and flu virus
Safe to use where food is prepared: chopping board, kitchen worktop and drainer
Safe to use around baby equipment: high chairs, changing mats and cribs
description: Product Description Dettol Anti-Bacterial Surface Cleaning Wipes are proven to kill bacteria E. coli, S.aureus, listeria, campylobacter, paerughosa, MRSA, salmonella viruses influenza - type A H1N1. Dettol Anti-Bacterial Surface Cleaning Wipes are proven to remove allergens pollen particles, dust mites, pet dander. Ingredients Per 100g Product Contains 0.40g Benzalkonium Chloride, Contains Disinfectant, Parfum Directions 1. Pull back the resealable cover, Pull out wipe. 2. Reseal after each usage and store cover facing down to avoid drying out. 3. Wipe surface for a more hygienic clean and then dispose of wipe. Safety Warning Caution: Keep out of reach of children. If swallowed: Call a poison centre or Doctor /physician if you feel unwell. See more
